response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically accomplished individual contributor with genuine depth in developer tooling, CI/CD infrastructure, and test automation, but this role is a people management position with an explicit 2-year minimum for team leadership — a requirement his resume does not address at any point in his career. All tenures are framed as individual contributor or founder roles; 'Staff' titles reflect technical seniority rather than organizational accountability. While his community workshops and open-source project ownership hint at an ability to influence peers, there is no evidence of hiring decisions, performance management, sustained 1:1s, or formal team ownership. The mobile platform focus of the role further widens the gap, as his iOS experience is limited to a brief maintenance stint at WatchUp.
strengths: Concrete developer tooling experience — CI/CD infrastructure setup, test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators — directly maps to the engineering productivity focus of the role
~20 years of technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems provides the hands-on credibility needed to earn trust from a team of engineers
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks, full-day workshops, and community Refactoring Dojos signals an inclination to develop others, a foundational trait for engineering management
concerns: Zero demonstrable people management experience — no mention of hiring, performance reviews, structured 1:1s, or direct reports across any role in a 20-year career

All positions are individual contributor or solo-founder roles; the absence of a formal team leadership tenure is a hard disqualifier for a Level II Manager role requiring 2+ years of people management
Mobile platform expertise is superficial — one brief iOS/Apple TV maintenance period at WatchUp — falling well short of the preferred mobile-platform depth for a role serving a major mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: No formal technical leadership track record
